hypothesis: Within NN-BAX, choosing at each iteration the NEB image with the highest predictive epistemic uncertainty (estimated by a 5-member EquiformerV2 deep ensemble) as the next simulator query will reduce the number of expensive function evaluations needed to match classical NEB’s fmax threshold and achieve <1% barrier error by at least 30% compared to random path sampling on LJ7 and LJ38 transitions with one or more intermediate minima.
